mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO knowledge_file_chunk_enrichment ( knowledge_base_id, file_id, chunk_id, enrichment_strategy, summary, questions_json, embedding_text_bucket, embedding_text_object_key, llm_provider, llm_model, prompt_version, status, error_message, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{entity.knowledgeBaseId}, #{entity.fileId}, #{entity.chunkId}, #{entity.enrichmentStrategy}, #{entity.summary}, #{entity.questionsJson}, #{entity.embeddingTextBucket}, #{entity.embeddingTextObjectKey}, #{entity.llmProvider}, #{entity.llmModel}, #{entity.promptVersion}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.errorMessage}, #{entity.createdAt}, #{entity.updatedAt} )
